kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

test.name: Midweek Holidays in English

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
kw.doc: Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And User should see holiday name
kw.doc: Verifies that a specific holiday name appears in the results

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system correctly displays Finnish midweek holidays in English for a standard year, ensuring basic functionality works as expected.

test.name: Midweek Holidays in Finnish

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for Finnish year
kw.doc: Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in Finnish

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And User should see holiday name
kw.doc: Verifies that a specific holiday name appears in the results

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system correctly displays Finnish midweek holidays in Finnish language, ensuring localization works properly.

test.name: Past Year Holidays

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
kw.doc: Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And User should see holiday name
kw.doc: Verifies that a specific holiday name appears in the results

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system correctly calculates and displays holidays for past years, ensuring historical data accuracy.

test.name: Future Year Holidays

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
kw.doc: Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And User should see holiday name
kw.doc: Verifies that a specific holiday name appears in the results

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system correctly calculates and displays holidays for future years, ensuring forward calculation accuracy.

test.name: Validate Holidays for Earliest Supported Year

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
kw.doc: Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And User should see at least one holiday displayed
kw.doc: Verifies that at least one holiday is shown in the results table

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=No holidays found in the results table
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system correctly returns holidays for the earliest supported year, ensuring boundary year handling works as expected.

test.name: Validate Holidays for Far Future Year

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User sees working day holidays for year
kw.doc: Verifies that holidays are displayed for the specified year in English

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: public holidays in Finland that fall on a working day
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And User should see at least one holiday displayed
kw.doc: Verifies that at least one holiday is shown in the results table

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=No holidays found in the results table
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system correctly returns holidays for a far future year, ensuring future boundary year handling works as expected.

test.name: Handle Unsupported Year Input

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User should see error message containing
kw.arg: Please enter a valid year between 1900 and 2100
kw.doc: Verifies that a specific error message is displayed

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system displays an appropriate error message when the user enters an unsupported year (below minimum allowed).

test.name: Handle Empty Year Input

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User submits form with empty year
kw.doc: Attempts to submit the form without entering a year

kw.name: Clear Text
kw.doc: Clears the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User should see HTML5 validation message
kw.doc: Verifies that HTML5 form validation prevents submission with empty required field

kw.name: Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal
kw.arg: msg=Year input should have required attribute
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are equal.

kw.name: Evaluate JavaScript
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: msg=Year field should be invalid when empty
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system handles empty year input appropriately through HTML5 validation.

test.name: Handle Invalid Year Format

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User should see error message containing
kw.arg: Please enter a valid integer year
kw.doc: Verifies that a specific error message is displayed

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system displays an appropriate error message when the user enters non-numeric year input.

test.name: Year Above Maximum Range

kw.name: Given User opens the application
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance and navigates to the holiday application

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: When User enters year and language
kw.doc: Enters year and selects language, then submits the form

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then User should see error message containing
kw.arg: Please enter a valid year between 1900 and 2100
kw.doc: Verifies that a specific error message is displayed

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser instance

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Verifies that the system displays an appropriate error message when the user enters a year above the maximum supported range.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
